query: Use datocms-setup-sandbox-iteration to add a helper that destroys and reforks a DatoCMS sandbox, then reruns migrations in place while I iterate locally.
Please run datocms-setup-sandbox-iteration in this repo. I already have CLI migrations set up and I want a reusable sandbox reset loop.
Invoke datocms-setup-sandbox-iteration and wire a datocms:sandbox:reset package script for local migration development.
Use datocms-setup-migration-release-workflow so I can promote a migrated sandbox to primary with maintenance mode.
How do I manually fork a DatoCMS environment and run migrations in place?
I want to import Contentful content into DatoCMS using the CLI.
